div1.entryFree: Breech, the garment worn by men over the lower part of the body; once not inflected: that you might ne'er have stolen the b. from Lancaster, H6C V, 5, 24 (i. e. usurped the authority of your husband). Breeches: Gentl. II, 7, 49. Shr. III, 2, 44. John III, 1, 201. H8 I, 3, 31. Lr. I, 4, 190. Oth. II, 3, 93. though in his place most master wear no --es, H6B I, 3, 149 (have not the authority due to the husband).
